{{Quote|You will do well not to underestimate me, nor should you mock the vast resources at the Emperor's command.|Birket|<ref name="Imperial Double-Cross">''[[Imperial Double-Cross]]''</ref>}}
'''Birket''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who achieved the rank of [[Major/Legends|Major]] within the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]. In this capacity, he had a number of dealings with the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boddu Bocck]]. On one of these encounters, Birket's assistant was killed by a stray cross-bow bolt from the bounty hunter.
[[File:BirketcapuresOkeefe.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Birket toys with [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].]]

Birket was assigned to capture the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]]. She was known to work heavily for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], as well as making a mockery of Imperial Customs. She eluded Birket a number of times, and so when she "kidnapped" a boy from [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal]], he decided to hire Bocck and his associates to aid in capturing her. Birket ventured into the lower depths of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], to the seedy section of [[Port Town (Cloud City)/Legends|Port Town]] to confront Birket. Offering 5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] each up front to Bocck and his associates [[Beylyssa]] and [[Tolga]], along with another 25,000 on completion of the mission.

Birket then traveled with Bocck to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to capture Okeefe's companion, [[Tru'eb Cholakk]]. In [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], Birket made use of a [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] spy to tail Cholakk. While this alerted the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] that something was up, it also allowed Birket to set a trap around his quarry's ship, the ''[[Luudrian Star]]''. With Cholakk captured, the Major ordered the ship flown to Okeefe's prearranged rendezvous point, [[Dead Bantha Gulch]]. There, he succeeded in capturing Okeefe, only to have her "captive", [[Darrik]], escape. The boy had actually voluntarily accompanied the smuggler in a form of apprenticeship. On the loose, he managed to free Okeefe and Cholakk. Together they took Birket captive and fled the planet. Okeefe planned to turn the Major over to the Rebel Alliance.

The Major carried a walking stick with a knife embedded in the end. When needed, he would flick out the blade and use it as a weapon.

==Appearances==
*''[[Imperial Double-Cross]]'' {{1st}}
